name: mac-download-manager-extensions
description: Cross-browser extensions for Mac Download Manager

scripts.dev:chrome: bun run build && open -a 'Mac Download Manager' && web-ext run --source-dir dist/chrome --target chromium --chromium-binary "/Applications/Google Chrome Canary.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome Canary"
scripts.dev:firefox: bun run build && open -a 'Mac Download Manager' && web-ext run --source-dir dist/firefox --target firefox-desktop
